## Safety checklist

- [ ] No secrets, runtime state, logs, or generated dependency folders are included
- [ ] License/commercial-use expectations remain intact
- [ ] Handoff/event/lease behavior is documented if changed
- [ ] Unverified behavior is not described as guaranteed
